title: Industrial Engineering (English) Program Educational Objectives
content:
Industrial Engineering (English) Program Educational Objectives

Program Educational Objectives

1. To educate graduates who can build successful careers as distinguished engineers across a wide range of sectors, including manufacturing, management, and healthcare.

2. To educate graduates who can pursue academic careers at national and international levels.

3. To educate graduates who can develop and manage projects by utilizing research skills, as well as individual and teamwork abilities, to solve real-world problems.

4. To educate individuals who can adapt to technological and social changes, and who continuously update their professional knowledge and skills.

5. To educate graduates who can assume leadership roles in decision-making, initiating change, and managing processes within organizations.

6. To educate graduates who contribute to societal welfare and the advancement of the profession, through active participation in social and/or professional activities, with strong economic, social, and ethical awareness.
